description: Long-form component scores and weighted contribution for one stage.
sql:
SELECT * FROM (
WITH selected AS (
  SELECT *
  FROM featurestore:merged_stage_execution_scores_v1
  WHERE name = :well_name
    AND stage_num_td = CAST(:stage_num AS DOUBLE PRECISION)
    AND formula_version = :formula_version
    AND normalization_version = :normalization_version
  LIMIT 1
)
SELECT 'A - Process Stability' AS component, score_a AS score, 0.20 AS weight,
       score_a * 0.20 AS weighted_contribution, '#2878B5' AS color FROM selected
UNION ALL
SELECT 'B - Event Burden', score_b, 0.36, score_b * 0.36, '#D35400' FROM selected
UNION ALL
SELECT 'C - Substage Coherence', score_c, 0.16, score_c * 0.16, '#2A9D6F' FROM selected
UNION ALL
SELECT 'D - Achievable Telemetry', score_d, 0.28, score_d * 0.28, '#7A5AF8' FROM selected
) q
